title: International Advisory Committee (IAC)
focus: Explains the composition, role, and historical sessions of the IAC, which is the primary advisory body for the programme.
rationale: Fallback section derived from packet-level grouping.
sectionExcerpt:
[Page 008]
Process: Memory of the World Programme
1. International Advisory Committee (IAC)
Composed of 14 members appointed by the Director-General of UNESCO. The IAC:
- Examines full documentation (description, origin, world significance, conservation).
- Recommends items for inscription to the Executive Board of UNESCO.
- Formulates major policies, including technical, legal, and financial frameworks.
Biennial meetings in odd-numbered years for inscription decisions.

[Page 009]
IAC Session | Date | Site
1st | 1993 Sept 12-14 | Pułtusk, Poland
2nd | 1995 May 3-5 | Paris, France
3rd | 1997 Sept 29 – Oct 1 | Tashkent, Uzbekistan
15th | 2025 Feb 26–28 | Paris, France
